workLog.action: Selected issue #1692 (P1) from candidates JSON; matches branch feat/1692-autonomous
workLog.result: No existing PR found via gh pr list --head feat/1692-autonomous and search for 'Fixes #1692'

workLog.action: Verified all 5 orchestrator sources share an identical 'Session Gate (Blocking)' block and that wiki/concepts/ does not exist yet
workLog.result: Plan: create authoritative wiki/concepts/Session Capture Protocol.md, expand session-log checklist item across all 5 sources, add SESSION-PROTOCOL.md Phase 1 cross-reference

decisions.decision: Treat templates/agents/orchestrator.shared.md as the canonical source and apply the identical sub-section to the 4 platform-specific files (src/claude, src/copilot-cli, src/vs-code-agents, .claude/agents).
decisions.rationale: Existing structure already shows verbatim duplication; keeping the four platform files in sync prevents drift between deployed surfaces.
That file does not contain a Session Gate (Blocking) section, so the change is not applicable; modifying its structure would be out of scope for issue #1692.

decisions.decision: Proceed despite issue #1692 listing #1688 (eval methodology) as 'Blocked By'.
decisions.rationale: The eval methodology gates validation of prompt changes, not the documentation/protocol addition itself. Issue #1688 is not yet implemented; waiting indefinitely would block the protocol gap that PRs #1680/#1676 explicitly created. Once #1688 lands, evals can be retroactively applied to this prompt section. Recorded as a follow-up rather than a hard blocker.

nextSteps: Once issue #1688 (eval methodology) lands, run the orchestrator prompt evals against the new Session Capture Protocol section to validate behavioral compliance.
If the wiki concept directory grows, consider an index file at wiki/concepts/README.md.
